test_type: Frontend QA - CR-030 Inward Screens Audit
summary: QA testing for CR-030 Inward Screens Audit. All 4 phases verified: (1) VendorManagement toast import confirmed, delete confirmation dialog works, (2) 'Pushed to' column visible with '5 stores' badges for Central Store user, (3) Purchase file inputs have G-014/G-015 notices and disabled functionality, (4) 'Empty' badges (22 found) displayed for 0-stock items. Regression tests passed for vendor CRUD, ingredient search/edit, and categories tab.

tests.feature: Phase 1 - VendorManagement Toast on Delete Error
tests.details: VendorManagement.jsx has toast import (line 12). Delete confirmation dialog works. Toast is used on line 74 for delete errors. Tested delete flow - dialog appears with 'Delete Vendor' button. 3 vendors visible after one deletion.

tests.feature: Phase 1 - IngredientCatalogue Add Ingredient Error Toast
tests.details: IngredientCatalogue.jsx has toast import (line 17). Add Ingredient dialog has validation - Save button is disabled when required fields (Name, Category) are empty. Toast on error at lines 244-245.
'Pushed to' column header found in ingredients table. 48 pushed-to cells found with '5 stores' badges. Column only visible for isTopLevel (Central Store) users as per code logic.

Upload Invoice tab shows G-014 notice: 'AI Invoice Extraction — Coming Soon'. Excel upload shows G-015 notice. Both file inputs have onChange handlers that clear value and show toast. OCR pending notice visible.

Found 22 'Empty' badges for items with 0 quantity. Found 24 'OK' badges for items with stock. Found 2 'Low' badges for low-stock items. Badge logic at lines 129-136 correctly shows Empty for 0 quantity.

Add Vendor button works, dialog opens with form fields. Edit Vendor dialog works with pre-filled data. Search filters vendors correctly (1 result for 'Premium'). Refresh button works. Delete confirmation dialog works.
All columns present: Name, Category, Quantity, Min Alert, Status, Recipes, Vendor, Pushed to, Actions. Search works (1 result for 'Almond'). Edit ingredient dialog works.
Manual Entry tab works. Vendor select, Purchase date, Item select, Qty input, Batch label, Expiry date all present. Add Another Item button works. Review & Confirm button present.

critical_code_review_comments: VendorManagement.jsx: Toast import at line 12, used correctly at line 74 for delete error handling
IngredientCatalogue.jsx: Toast import at line 17, used at lines 199, 217, 244-245 for error handling
IngredientCatalogue.jsx: 'Pushed to' column correctly gated by isTopLevel check (lines 119, 142-149)
IngredientCatalogue.jsx: Empty badge logic at lines 132-133 correctly checks for 0 quantity
AddStockPurchaseForm.jsx: File input onChange handlers at lines 263-265 and 289-291 correctly clear value and show toast with G-014/G-015 messages
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: CR-030 Inward Screens Audit fully verified. Phase 1: Toast notifications working for VendorManagement delete errors and IngredientCatalogue add errors. Phase 2: 'Pushed to' column shows '5 stores' for Central Store users. Phase 3: Purchase file inputs disabled with G-014/G-015 messages. Phase 4: 'Empty' badges (gray) shown for 0-stock items. All regression tests passed.
